# CWE-378 safe — Creation of Temporary File With Insecure Permissions (mitigated)
lang: go
file: CWE-378-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

type GinCtx struct {
	Request *http.Request
}

func CacheExportChunk(c *GinCtx) error {
	f, err := os.CreateTemp("", "export-*.bin")
	if err != nil {
		return err
	}
	defer f.Close()
	if err := os.Chmod(f.Name(), 0600); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	_, err = f.Write([]byte(c.Request.PostFormValue("chunk")))
	return err
}
